summary: Iteration 166: Comprehensive E2E testing of RPG Page, IntroVideo, and multiple modules. All critical features WORKING. RPG quest clicks navigate correctly (meditation→/meditation, journal→/journal, mood→/mood). Quest cards are now BUTTON elements. Tabs switch content. 3-Breath Reset awards XP. IntroVideo mute button toggles correctly. Game module links (Mine, Decode, Nexus, Dreams) navigate properly. Cosmic Store, SmartDock, Rock Hounding, Refinement Lab, Evolution Lab, Cosmic Mixer all load and function.

issues: Circle tab not found - may not be implemented

context_for_next_testing_agent: All RPG page features verified working. QuestCard is now a button element with onNavigate for path routing. IntroVideo mute button has stopPropagation and touchEnd handler. Tabs have touchAction:manipulation. SmartDock route is /smartdock (not /smart-dock). Test user has 103 Cosmic Dust, 0 Celestial Gems, 0 Soul Fragments.

RPG Quest Clicks - meditation.details: Clicking Still Mind quest navigates to /meditation

RPG Quest Clicks - journal.details: Clicking Inner Scribe quest navigates to /journal

RPG Quest Clicks - mood.details: Clicking Emotional Compass quest navigates to /mood

RPG Tab Switching.details: Quests, Character, Inventory, Shop, World, Bosses tabs all switch content

RPG 3-Breath Reset.details: Button found, clicked, awards +10 XP with toast notification

IntroVideo Mute Button.details: Video player opens, mute button toggles mute/unmute correctly

Cosmic Store.details: 7 buy buttons found, Consumables/Cosmetics/Credits/Nexus Pass tabs visible

SmartDock Page.details: Page loads at /smartdock with Slot a Stone button and Evolve/Refine/Store options

Rock Hounding Page.details: Extraction button found, mining depths and universe layer visible

Refinement Lab.details: Page loads with Digital Tumbler, Starseed Components, Your Collection sections

Evolution Lab.details: Page loads with Alchemical Exchange and specimen filters

Cosmic Mixer.details: Page loads with Session Mode, Soundscapes, AI Frequency Blend, Solfeggio Frequencies

Navigation Links.details: Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore all found in nav

RPG Shop Tab.details: Dust Shop, Gem Shop, Buy Gems, Slots views available with items

user_reported_issues_resolved.RPG Quests not working: RESOLVED - QuestCard converted to button with onNavigate
user_reported_issues_resolved.IntroVideo mute button not working: RESOLVED - Added stopPropagation and touchEnd handler
